title: Policy: Remove some settings from Policy - Settings Unlocked
scenario: Verify that removing settings from a Cloud Policy and applying changes unlocks those settings in the app, allowing their values to be modified.
steps: 1. Open the Policy on the Cloud and remove specific settings from it.
2. Apply the changes to the Policy on the Cloud.
3. Open the app and navigate to the settings that were previously locked by the policy.
4. Verify that those settings are now unlocked (i.e., no longer locked by policy).
5. Attempt to change the values of those settings.
6. Confirm that the values can be changed successfully.
expected: Settings removed from the Policy on the Cloud are unlocked in the app, and their values can be changed.
